message:
🐛 fix: add periodic cache refresh for cluster groups (#10007) (#10012)

The in-memory cluster group cache was only populated at startup from the
persistent store. In multi-instance deployments, writes on one instance
never propagated to others, causing split-brain UI behavior.

Add a background goroutine that re-syncs the in-memory map from the DB
every 30 seconds, with proper shutdown cleanup to avoid goroutine leaks.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
